name: case-escalation
description: Automatically escalate cases based on priority and age

priorityLevel.description: Case priority that triggers escalation (e.g., High, Critical)

escalationQueueId.description: Queue ID to escalate cases to

notifyManager.description: Whether to notify the manager on escalation

elements.instruction: Add a Get Records called Find_Cases to get Case records where Priority equals {{priorityLevel}} and Status not equals Closed and CreatedDate is less than NOW() - {{ageThresholdHours}} hours
Add a decision called Check_Cases with rule Has_Cases if Find_Cases has records then Escalate_Cases, otherwise End
Add a loop called Loop_Cases to loop through Find_Cases
Add a record update called Escalate_Case to update current item from loop, setting OwnerId to {{escalationQueueId}} and IsEscalated to true
Add an action called Send_Email to send email notification about escalated case
